title: Chemically Competent V. natriegens Cells
author: Carlos H
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pumdnu6
materials: Pool the cells in two 50ml falcons
Pool the cells into one 50ml falcon
Aliquot the cells into chilled tubes (50µl aliquots)

steps.title: Inoculate 150ml BHI + V2-Salts in a buffled flask
steps.instruction: Inoculate 150ml BHI + V2-Salts in a buffled flask

steps.title: Incubate shaking
steps.instruction: Incubate shaking: OD = 0.4, 30°C, 200rpm Undetermined 02:30:00, Competent V. natriegens

steps.title: Centrifuge
steps.instruction: Centrifuge: 3000g, 5min, RT 00:05:00, 1. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens

steps.title: Resuspend by gently inversion in 5ml 100mM MgCl 2
steps.instruction: Resuspend by gently inversion in 5ml 100mM MgCl 2

steps.title: Centrifuge
steps.instruction: Centrifuge: 3000g, 4min, RT 00:04:00, 2. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet by gently inversion...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet by gently inversion in 5ml 100mM CaCl 2

steps.title: Incubate
steps.instruction: Incubate: 20min, RT 00:20:00, Incubation competent V. natriegens

steps.title: Centrifuge
steps.instruction: Centrifuge: 3000g, 4min, RT 00:04:00, 3. Centrifuge competent V. natriegens

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet by gently invertion in 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet by gently invertion in 1.5ml modified Inoue buffer

steps.title: Add DMSO to a volume concentration of 7% (=105µl)
steps.instruction: Add DMSO to a volume concentration of 7% (=105µl)
